title: Reading - Part 1
instructions: For each question, choose the correct answer.

questions.heading: Train Passengers
questions.text: The 7:40 train to Westford will not stop at Green Lane today. Passengers for Green Lane should take the 7:55 bus from outside the station. Train tickets will be accepted on this bus.
questions.question: What should some passengers do today?

options.C: Use a bus instead of part of their train journey.
options.A: Buy another ticket before travelling to Green Lane.
options.B: Wait for a later train at Green Lane station.

questions.explanation: Passengers for Green Lane should take the bus using their train tickets.

questions.heading: Message from Kate to Sophie
questions.text: Sophie, I enjoyed the film, although it wasn’t as funny as the reviews said. The ending was brilliant, though. You were right about booking early — every seat was taken! Kate
questions.question: What does Kate say about the film?

options.A: She liked some parts more than others.
options.B: She thought the reviews were completely correct.
options.C: She was disappointed that the cinema was empty.

questions.explanation: Kate says the film was not very funny, but the ending was brilliant.

questions.heading: Music Shop Sale
questions.text: All keyboards are reduced this week. Customers buying a keyboard can also get half-price headphones. The offer is available in the shop only, not online, and ends when the shop closes on Saturday.
questions.question: What does the advert say?

options.B: People must visit the shop to get the special offer.
options.A: Headphones are half price for every customer.
options.C: The online sale continues after Saturday.

questions.explanation: The offer is only available in the shop.

questions.heading: From: Miss Brown / Subject: Reading groups
questions.text: Next week you’ll work in reading groups. I’ve put the lists on the classroom wall. If your name is missing, tell me before Friday, because I need to order enough copies of each book.
questions.question: Why should students check the lists?

options.C: To make sure they receive the right book.
options.A: To choose which group they prefer.
options.B: To decide whether they want to read.

questions.explanation: Miss Brown needs correct lists to order enough books.

questions.heading: Lost Property
questions.text: Coats, lunch boxes and sports bags found this term are now in Room 12. Anything not collected by Friday afternoon will be donated. Students may visit during morning break or after school.
questions.question: What does the poster warn students?

options.A: They may lose items permanently if they wait too long.
options.B: They can only collect lost things during lessons.
options.C: They must pay to get sports bags back.

questions.explanation: Uncollected items will be donated after Friday afternoon.
